faqs.question: What types of flies do you treat in Westfield homes?
faqs.answer: We treat all common fly species in Westfield including house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and cluster flies. Our technicians will identify the specific species affecting your property and implement targeted treatment strategies to eliminate them at their source.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a fly problem in Westfield?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Westfield properties. Fly infestations can escalate quickly, so we prioritize rapid response to assess your situation and begin treatment as soon as possible.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 fly control service include?
faqs.answer: Our fly control service includes a thorough inspection, identification of breeding sites, targeted treatment using professional-grade products, sanitation recommendations, and follow-up visits if needed. The final price depends on your property size, infestation severity, and treatment complexity.

faqs.question: Are your fly control treatments safe for children and pets in Westfield homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can discuss eco-friendly treatment options for sensitive households.
